programme.title: Sesame Street: Game Day on Sesame Street

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Petercadabra/ Sleepless in Pinkville

programme.title: The Trouble With Maggie Cole

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Roadkill
programme.desc: Promoted to justice minister, Peter deals with a prison riot, an angry daughter and alarming contacts from a stranger. Meanwhile, an unknown threat looms abroad.

programme.title: Cobra

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Smoked
programme.desc: A key witness in a rape case is murdered during an afternoon shopping trip with her daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: True Believers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alta Kockers
programme.desc: The investigation into a promising new author's death leads to a decades-old secret kept between two reclusive brothers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Missing
programme.desc: The SVU pursues a suspect when a child is discovered in the trunk of an abandoned car.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: I'm Going to Make You a Star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Darkest Journey Home
programme.desc: Benson works with a young woman to help her remember the details and suspects in her rape. In order to learn a new witness interview technique, Rollins and Fin have to experience it for themselves.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Down Low in Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: A serial predator targeting men in gay bars proves difficult to catch, until a celebrity comes forward with his story.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night
programme.desc: When Alex tells Phil and Claire she has a boyfriend, they worry they’ve put too much pressure on her and has made up an imaginary boyfriend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rescue
programme.desc: Detective Benson continues her search for Calvin's drug-addicted mother. When her name comes up during a rape investigation, Benson cannot resist getting involved despite being ordered not to.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pop
programme.desc: A young boy is found dead on a park carousel after being dropped off by his uncle. When detectives learn he was beaten to death, they suspect it may be the school bully, but the investigation leads them to a gambling ring.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Dateline: Toxic

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: When a woman's college sweetheart re-enters her life unexpectedly over Christmas, she begins thinking about her life.

programme.title: Movie: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: After returning to her hometown for Christmas, a woman finds her home lacks Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When food stylist Holly returns home for Christmas, she learns that Loretta, the elderly owner of her favorite childhood bakery, is retiring and has started a contest to give the bakery away.

programme.title: Movie: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Stephanie is crushed when her boyfriend breaks up with her just before the holiday season. Heartbroken and homeless she decides to fly home, but the red eye flight on Christmas Eve is diverted.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Live Life Foward
programme.desc: Creating an unforgettable experience for critically ill children and their families.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: The Road Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Two rival musicians find themselves working together to road trip to each other’s hometowns for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: After being marooned in her Tennessee hometown after a snowstorm, a country music star is pressured to take part in the local Christmas concert.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Oklahoma City Bombing
programme.desc: In 1995, a federal building in Oklahoma City was torn apart by a powerful truck bomb killing 168 people. The man responsible was a decorated war hero who had turned against his own government.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Innocence Defiled
programme.desc: The religious leader of a Hindu community in Texas flees after having been convicted of sexually abusing the children of his followers.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Good Wife
programme.desc: Months after their arranged marriage, a young husband from India allegedly beats his wife to death while the two work an overnight shift in the kitchen of a Maryland donut shop.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fugitive Mom
programme.desc: A young mother chooses to vanish with her two-year-old daughter and a serial child molester is caught in Texas, but flees his trial and begins his monstrous pattern again.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Justice Denied
programme.desc: Patty and Jerry Wetterling got a phone call in 1989 saying their son had been taken by an unknown abductor. For the past 25 years, new leads have come and gone, but they still await answers in his disappearance. Plus, scammers in Hawaii are on the run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big River Redemption
programme.desc: Mark and Digger struggle to get a special recipe run for a shine legend. Big Chuck attempts to redeem himself after destroying Josh's operation. Chico and Sandra continue work on their still site but disaster strikes on the road to riches.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Time Machine
programme.desc: Tim needs to rescue his operation, challenging the laws of nature and time. Mark and Digger implement a high-tech addition to their operation that could double their output, if it doesn't blow them up. Jeff and Lance make a once banned liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Dog Days of Shining
programme.desc: Josh and Big Chuck attempt to revive their season with a new still site. Mark and Digger are ready to put their still design to the test. Mark and Mike take their first steps grab at a new territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smokey Mountain Gin
programme.desc: Tim Smith aims to put a whiskey time machine to the test. Chico and Sandra switch gears with a new recipe in hopes of jump starting their stalled season. Mark and Digger opt to experiment with distilling an old classic on their high-speed rig.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Green Dragon
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck aim to get back on top but circumstances could leave them dead to law. Money threatens to destroy an age-old partnership for Jeff, Mark and Lance. Mark and Digger painstakingly craft a special brew for a high rolling customer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big City Bootleg
programme.desc: Josh and Big Chuck go underground to build a new stash site. Mark and Digger venture out of the Smokeys and into the big city for the biggest sale of their careers. Patti and David follow nature's harvest to make a sweet new brew.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big Wheels Keep on Turning
programme.desc: Mark and Digger bring in a moonshine legend to rev up production. Josh and Chuck turn to an old power source to prolong their operation. Chico and Sondra gear up for their first big sale of the season.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Green Devil
programme.desc: Jeff and Lance attempt to salvage their absinthe recipe. Mark puts his new partner to the test. Backbreaking labour and a lack of profit threaten to leave Josh up the creek without a paddle or a partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Thunder Pumpkins
programme.desc: An ingredient has Josh and Chuck ready to quit the biz. Mark and Digger band together with JB to run their signature spirit, but a mishap could send them running. Tim puts his turbo-aged whiskey to the test.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Pot Bang Bang
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck struggle to finish winterizing their site. Mark and Digger bring their two-pot still out of retirement. While Mark and Mike have enjoyed a string of successful runs, delivering the goods could land them in the crosshairs of the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Intruder Alert
programme.desc: Mark and Digger clash with the law. A breach from an intruder leaves Josh and Chuck deep in debt. Chico and Sondra's operation is burned.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Call
programme.desc: Winter hot on their heels, shiners aim to cash in. A legendary partnership comes to a bittersweet end as Jeff, Mark and Lance head their separate ways. Tim gets to spend time with and old friend. Patti and David end their season with a boatload of shine.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mt. Adams' UFO Encounter
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot follow headlines of hidden hangars and strange orbs of light into an active volcano in Washington.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: The Amazon's Cursed Ruins
programme.desc: Expedition X explores an abandoned and haunted outpost in the Amazon rainforest. After meeting with tribes deep in the jungle, they hear strange things at night that cause panic.

programme.title: Expedition X: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica head to Lake Lanier, the deadliest lake in America, to uncover rumors of drownings and ghostly encounters.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Super Heavyweight Ladies
programme.desc: Whitney trains for the State Championships with a new weightlifting coach. Then, she has some special words to share with Chase.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Amends Between Friends
programme.desc: Ryan surprises Whitney with a hefty business proposition and she is forced to get on board or miss the opportunity of a lifetime. Meanwhile, Buddy sits Whitney down to make amends.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: When Whitney and Todd hatch an exciting new business plan, Ryan's negative reaction threatens to derail not only their upcoming trip to Paris but also Whitney's performance at the North Carolina State Weightlifting Championships.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Fat Girl in Paris
programme.desc: The trip to Paris is underway and expectations are high, but Whitney worries when she and Ryan clash over their opposing business plans. Meanwhile, Whitney finally warms up to talk to Chase about their future, but his reaction leaves her cold.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life
programme.desc: Whitney's love affair with Paris continues, but her relationship with Chase is on the rocks. And Ryan challenges Whitney to a brutal climb up the Eiffel Tower, but the biggest surprise of her life waits at the top.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Wedding Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: Now four months into their engagement, Whitney and Chase are no closer to living together, but wedding plans need to be made. During a mountain getaway, Whitney and Buddy test their new boundaries.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Our Piece of Heaven
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life
programme.desc: Whitney's love affair with Paris continues, but her relationship with Chase is on the rocks. And Ryan challenges Whitney to a brutal climb up the Eiffel Tower, but the biggest surprise of her life waits at the top.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Wedding Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: Now four months into their engagement, Whitney and Chase are no closer to living together, but wedding plans need to be made. During a mountain getaway, Whitney and Buddy test their new boundaries.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Our Piece of Heaven
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Jean Smart
programme.desc: Actress Jean Smart uncovers the curious tale of an unconventional ancestor in colonial Massachusetts, who got her children entangled in her own thievery ring. Later, she faced execution when she was accused of witchcraft.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Megan Mullally
programme.desc: Megan Mullally delves into a shocking pattern of dysfunction in her father's line. She discovers that her two times great-grandmother defied societal norms to fight for her family's survival, all the while struggling to hang on to her own sanity.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Adventures in Toddler Potty Training
programme.desc: Liz and Daniel try to potty train Rowan while keeping up with the needs of the quints. Daniel's brothers surprise Liz and Rowan with a playground for their backyard. As Connell struggles to gain weight, Liz and Daniel worry he may require a risky surgery.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: The Quints' First Halloween
programme.desc: The Hodges get ready for their first Halloween with their half dozen kids, including matching costumes for the quints. Later, Liz and Daniel are shocked to learn that Nolan, Connell, Liam and Dillon have medical conditions that may require surgeries.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: His Opinion...
programme.desc: Taylor brought her fiancé to help her find her dream gown. Brandi shops with her fiancé because she needs his approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Day, Mom's Way
programme.desc: Dina is 50 and fabulous and is looking for a dress as sassy as she is. Laura wants a simple lace dress but is having trouble pleasing her young entourage. Shandel wants to look glamorous in a fitted dress but her daughter, Paige, doesn't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: There's No 'I' in Groom
programme.desc: Samantha brings her fiancé dress shopping against her mom's wishes. Kelsey asks her best friend to help her pick a wedding dress but their visions don't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eye of the Bridal Storm
programme.desc: Legally blind bride Jessi argues with her overbearing mom about finding an age-appropriate dress. Passive bride Karen must make her voice heard above her opinionated pro-wrestler fiancé's. Bride Lindsay is exhausted after shopping with 13 bridesmaids.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Dress Against All Odds
programme.desc: After an accident, Katie is determined to walk down the aisle in her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Whose Wedding Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Elizabeth hopes her fitting will be a lasting memory for her mom who is unable to attend her wedding.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I'm a Rockstar, Baby!
programme.desc: As the lead singer of one of Canada's most famous rock bands, Kelly Jay has lived quite a life and he has collected a massive hoard to prove it.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Battle With Chaos
programme.desc: If they don't change their extreme hoarding, Jeff might lose the children he adores and Debbie may never have children at all.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Do Something
programme.desc: The new coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. Kailyn opens up about her pregnancy.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant: Kash
programme.desc: Kash has been with her boyfriend Nate for about a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious with her.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Florida Georgia Line
programme.desc: Country superstars Florida Georgia Line join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to help deal with some "Bad Tree Vibez," take their pickup trucks on a "Bruise Cruise," and celebrate the dimwitted in" It's Simple."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nev Schulman
programme.desc: 'Catfish' host Nev Schulman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to meet some fake celebs in 'Faux Famous', bask in epic chest in 'Chest Blessed' and experience marathon of pain.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXXXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo hit the beach with sea puppies, get stuck on repeat in over and over again, and have a Russian Mother's Day in mother Russians.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Snoop Dogg aka Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Snoop Dogg enjoys some over the tizzle celebrizzles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo discuss what makes bulls angry in 'any color will do', the cooking mistake that causes 'food bombs', and those who would be 'first to go' on a deserted island.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kane Brown
programme.desc: Country music superstar Kane Brown joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about true horror and when dream trucks turn into shattered dream trucks.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Highdiculousness
programme.desc: In this weed-centric episode, Rob, Steelo and Chanel observe some Animals in Pants, learn what it's like to have Bong Brain and ask themselves Am I High.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 50 Cent
programme.desc: 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his 'Crappy Birthday,' people who are 'Built Like 50,' and others who, like 50, are real 'Show Stealers.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness motorcycle revenge in Moto-Cide. Watch some unevolved Cave People, and experience twice the pain in Adding Injury to Injury.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Zach Holmes
programme.desc: Soulful singer Allen Stone joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put smiles to the test in Testing Positive, get frustrated with technology in Tech Wrecked, and learn that dogs can sometimes be Man's Worst Enemy.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some 'no look slaps,' hit the 'sensi-button' and experience the drama of 'the circle of life.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Danny Way

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Stakes and Low Blows
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, home to some of the biggest finds and worst dramas. Ivy has never hit it big here so he is focused on a good score no matter the cost. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi are determined to not let another big locker get away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Valley of the Hauls
programme.desc: Moreno Valley, California, is a bit out of the way, but any auction could have the hidden treasure that keeps the buyers on the hunt. Mary decides it is time to take matters into her own hands and launches a daring idea, while Ivy keeps it old school.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Like It Hotter
programme.desc: A few locals give Rene a run for his money, but that doesn't stop Mary from bidding beyond her budget.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock the Vote!
programme.desc: Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker while Jarrod and Brandi have good history in the area and hope for another score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Bid and No Bite
programme.desc: The day starts rough, but nothing can stop the hunt for treasure as the buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. Mary has to stay on a budget and learns a hard lesson about Dave. Rene tries a secret strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Just Deserts
programme.desc: Ivy uses a dastardly tactic to rouse the competition as the auction forces Mary to travel well out of her comfort zone. Rene steps up his game, while Darrell tries to score despite Brandon's sour mood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auctions and Allies
programme.desc: The buyers return to Koreatown for an auction near the heart of Los Angeles. In order to score a good locker, Brandi is forced to keep an eye out for more shenanigans from Jarrod. Ivy and Mary form an unexpected alliance.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Lockers and Uptown Dreams
programme.desc: An auction challenges the buyers to find a score in a tower of lockers in downtown Los Angeles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The School of Hard Knock-Knocks
programme.desc: Auctions in the college town of Rancho Dominguez have the buyers on the hunt for hip lockers with big scores. Darrell and Brandon are looking for quantity to feed their store, while Rene is targeting quality.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There's No Business Like Snow Business
programme.desc: Mary weathers the storm with gusto as Casey tries to keep Rene's eyes on the prize. Ivy doesn't let the cold weather freeze him out and goes on a buying spree, while Dave tries to heat things up.

programme.title: Storage Wars: From Dust 'Til Dawn
programme.desc: The desert country of Mojave, California, hosts a rough auction where the buyers have to dig deep to find value.

programme.title: Storage Wars: An Auction Too Far
programme.desc: A tough start in Santa Ana leads to a long day, as the buyers hit a second auction in Hawaiian Gardens, in hopes of finding a great locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mo' Money, Mo' Valley
programme.desc: Lockers go for big bucks as the buyers hit auctions in Moreno Valley, California. Ivy and Dave duke it out for a pair of units while Mary tries to avoid the shrapnel. One buyer hits it big with a twice-in-a-lifetime find that provides over $10K in profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock, Stock and One Smoking Darrell

programme.title: Storage Wars: Rene Abides

programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. He must try to piece together his mysterious past while eluding assassins.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Crazy Cat Opens Doors

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Brooklyn Cat Fight

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sister Smackdown
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her. The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Meow Mates

programme.desc: A pizza delivery boy falls into a cryogenic stasis tube the on the exact moment that 1999 comes to an end. When he awakens, he finds the date is December 31st, 2999. With the help of new friends, he must adapt to life in the 31st century.

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: Movie: Nightmare on Elm Street V: Dream Child

programme.title: House Hunters: Gym vs. Porch in Virginia

programme.title: House Hunters: Finding Feng Shui in Newport News

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Howling
programme.desc: Meet a hard-working couple whose French bulldog's bad behavior has caused them to miss business trips and ultimately lose out on work. Fondue recently failed a doggy day care entrance exam and now the couple has no one to watch him while they are away.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: French Bulldog Revolution
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer spins compulsively, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and a badly abused Lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Motor Mouth
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Diva's Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Nasir, a 150-lb. South African boerboel, guards the home of legendary recording artist and 2-time Grammy winner Patti LaBelle. Fearing his aggression could lead to an attack, Patti has actually contemplated having him put down.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs
programme.desc: It's the age-old rivalry of mail carriers vs. dogs. Now, Cesar makes a special delivery to the local Post Office in Roswell, Georgia to give some tips to the city's postal workers on encountering aggressive dogs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Red, White and Moo
programme.desc: Before enjoying the fourth of July, Dr. Pol must take care of the animals. Brenda prescribes anti-anxiety medication to a puppy so she can get through the fireworks and Dr. Pol tries to help a very sick dog in distress.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Fireball From Hell
programme.desc: When a series of accidental explosions erupt at a chemical factory, they completely destroy the area nearby, and now, new discoveries the real reasons behind the deadly chemical fireball that left a giant crater where there was once a building.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Cruise Ship Catastrophe
programme.desc: When a cruise ship meets disaster, the ship begins to sink and the captain flees, leaving 300 passengers stranded; now, new discoveries reveal the fatal truth behind the devastating wreck that claimed 32 lives.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Crash of the Concorde
programme.desc: The Concorde was the supersonic passenger plane that could fly from New York to London in under four hours, but after a fatal accident kills 100, experts reveal a secret history of the iconic aircraft that led to this devastating explosion.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Nightmare in Hell Valley
programme.desc: After torrential rainfall triggers a catastrophic landslide, a small village in the valley below is devastated, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the engineering that led to this fatal disaster.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Twisted: Murder Mates
programme.desc: In 1984, a killer couple goes on a brutal killing spree throughout the Midwest. After claiming the lives of 8 victims, the pair must decide if they'll keep killing or surrender to the police. Their mindless violence leaves the region shocked and appalled.

programme.title: Twisted: The Killer Next Door
programme.desc: The Bike Path Rapist terrorized the city of Buffalo for three decades. One part Mr. Normal, and one part Homicidal Maniac, no one knows he's living the life of a beloved pillar of the community.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Lust for Death
programme.desc: Ron Hiiri is a charming ladies' man, living the good life in upscale Connecticut. But along with the presence of an alluring new girlfriend and a mysterious stockbroker, comes a mix of financial and romantic entanglements that proves to be deadly.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: Two brothers run a lucrative snow removal business. But one of them grows devoted to a spiritual group and its enigmatic guru; while the other finds a more illicit path to enlightenment. The only thing that can stop this family feud is murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Right-Hand Con-Man
programme.desc: Denver's real estate market is on fire. So when Wall Street veteran Ken Germain promises big bucks everyone jumps aboard, including his right-hand man Colin Collea. But when the dream turns to dust, a raging mob of those betrayed, scream bloody murder.

programme.title: The Missing: Disappearances in Santa Monica Mountains
programme.desc: Elaine Park spends the night away from home in Santa Monica and is never seen again. Later, Matthew Weaver Jr. takes a late night drive and goes missing. Elaine and Matthew's vehicles have both been found in the Santa Monica Mountains.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mothers
programme.desc: Prisma Reyes vanishes from a parking garage after footage shows her getting on an elevator, but is never seen again. And then Andrea Knabel disappears during the middle of the night.

programme.title: The Missing: Never Came Back
programme.desc: Tyler Davis goes out and is seen on surveillance walking across a hotel parking lot. Police ping his phone, but can't locate him. Later, Kristal Reisinger seeks spiritual enlightenment, but vanishes after heading to a drum circle.

programme.title: The Missing: Off the Face of the Earth
programme.desc: 13-year-old Tabitha Tudors walks to her bus stop, but one day she doesn't come home. She never made it on the bus and police can't find her. And then 16-year-old Shemika Cosey vanishes while at a sleepover.

programme.title: Disappeared: Walk Into Darkness
programme.desc: Tammy Kingery disappears after leaving work sick. Her family finds a note saying she's gone for a walk from their home in the woods, but searches yield no signs. An investigation reveals secrets that lead to dark theories about the mother of three.

programme.title: Disappeared: So Close to Home
programme.desc: Ali Lowizter vanishes after getting off the school bus. The investigation stalls for two years until a tip comes in claiming Ali could have been trafficked.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Fear and Loathing in Houston
programme.desc: In April 2008, 39-year-old Houston native and mother of five, Tina DaVilla, runs errands with her 4 month old infant when she's attacked in a parking lot. In the next year, a rash of similar crimes breaks out across the city. Are they related?

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Murder or Suicide?
programme.desc: A 26-year-old is found shot to death inside her home. The medical examiner declares it a suicide, but a determined investigator takes another look after two different people close to the victim have a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Single Mom Missing
programme.desc: 31-year-old mother of two Michelle Warner vanishes without a trace from her apartment in Houston that she shares with her ex. With no concrete proof of anything untoward, police are left with a hunch that her checkered past has reared its ugly head.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches

programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Hometown Touch
programme.desc: Bug and the team are tasked with reclaiming materials from a historic vineyard that can turn a huge profit if they make it out unscathed.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Teacherage
programme.desc: The team head to Henderson, NC, to salvage parts from an old home that used to house young female teachers. They salvage an attic ladder, doors, archways, and columns as well as the home's fire escape.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Price Fuller Machine Shop
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, Grayson and Tay head to the Machine Shop they bought to see what they can find. The team finds items for new builds. As they're renovating the house on their property, they find many new builds are needed. Mike and Tay make a coffee bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To The Ferry
programme.desc: The team returns to the Norfolk, VA, ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peacock Salem Cleaners
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Salem, VA to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. The 100-year-old building is filled with antique laundromat parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Twin Capes Ferry
programme.desc: The crew heads to Norfolk, VA, to test their sea legs and salvage an obsolete ferry including lights, skylights and a mural. Back at the shop, Grayson helps Mike and Tay with a commissioned build for a fellow maker.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man 2017 winner Eddie Hall gets roped into a strength test with legendary boxing coach Buster Custus at a famed Philadelphia gym before he gets a double hit of delicious Philly cheesesteak.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All Greek to Me
programme.desc: It's a burger gift from the Greek gods. Michael Symon's Greek heritage is on full display as he makes a grilled Lamb Burger with Tzatziki. His wife, Liz, concocts an Ouzo Spritz with pickled watermelon rind that pairs perfectly with Michael's burger.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pasta, Tacos and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts his search for great bites on wheels in Venice Beach, Calif., at the Prince of Venice, a food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burgers, Pizza and Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller is hunting down must-eat food truck fare, and he starts in South Central Los Angeles at Billionaire Burger Boys. They make the classic pairing of burger and fries bigger, better and bolder.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts the day strong with a Chopped champion's hearty French crepe with an American twist and then keeps things rolling at a Brooklyn-style deli.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Jacksonville, Fla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks off his culinary escapades with a chef-driven dish of chorizo corn cakes with vegan queso and spicy guajillo chile sauce.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South
programme.desc: Ali Khan has only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Savannah, Ga., for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Queen City Cravings
programme.desc: Ali Khan is out to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Charlotte, N.C. Good things take time, so Ali starts his day with the sweet and satisfying "slowberry" cobbler waffle.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Tokyo
programme.desc: Anthony seeks to find the connection between knives and good sushi as he visits scenic Tokyo.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off a full day of Thanksgiving eats, including homemade pies and irresistible sides. And don't forget the turkey! These top picks for the big day will leave you feeling ready to feast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Deceit

programme.title: Dateline: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant, but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Skin in the Game

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Past Lives

programme.desc: Detective Saliyah 'Sunny' Qadri goes in search of District Attorney Page Ferguson, who she fears may be in danger. Qadri finds Ferguson just in time to witness her fall from the top of a parking garage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Totem
