programme.title: Movie: Mistletoe and Menorahs
programme.desc: After being enlisted by a co-worker's friend to decorate for the holidays. A young woman learns to appreciate various holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Temp
programme.desc: A young woman discovers a special Christmas temp agency which lands her many festive jobs.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Burning Rage
programme.desc: Jennifer Puente is on the loose after allegedly torturing and setting her friend Moriah Gonzales on fire with her boyfriend Joe Alvarado.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Stolen Innocence
programme.desc: A father goes on the run after he rapes his 12 year-old stepdaughter for five years before she comes forward and shares the truth. Two coworkers and roommates become close and greed drives one to allegedly murder the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Killer Writing
programme.desc: John J. Lennon is a murderer that has built a literary career by writing about the prison system he lives in. Chris Cuomo talks with John J. Lennon about his crime, doing his time, and why he traded his gun for a pen.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo goes inside a maximum-security prison for an exclusive interview with one of America’s most notorious serial killers, Joel Rifkin. Cuomo asks him tough questions about his sordid sex life, why he murdered and how he was caught.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Anatomy of a Rape
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo hears the first-hand accounts of rape survivors and examines what hurdles they face to get justice.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Snake King: Part 1
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the ancient Mayan city of El Mirador in search of the lost tombs of a mysterious ruling dynasty called the Snake Kings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries Of The Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Josh searches the ocean floor and the skies for as he investigates mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Revealing the Triangle
programme.desc: In the conclusion of his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights. Then, Expedition X probes America's most haunted lake and an extraterrestrial cult in Thailand.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: The Gates Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads back into the world for a night of big mysteries and bigger guests. Josh welcomes Oscar winner Matthew McConaughey, joins Expedition X's Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot on their latest adventure and talks to Dean Haglund of The X Files.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters have uncovered a priceless find: a long-lost hoard of Knights Templar relics that could rewrite history. Using cutting-edge methods, they set off on an expedition to reveal the dark secrets behind this mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: The Gates Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads back into the world for a night of big mysteries and bigger guests. Josh welcomes Oscar winner Matthew McConaughey, joins Expedition X's Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot on their latest adventure and talks to Dean Haglund of The X Files.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters have uncovered a priceless find: a long-lost hoard of Knights Templar relics that could rewrite history. Using cutting-edge methods, they set off on an expedition to reveal the dark secrets behind this mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Deciphering the Last Nazi Code
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the former Third Reich in search of an elusive Nazi fortune hidden with a code allegedly created by Hitler's private secretary, and embedded into a piece of sheet music.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: About Time
programme.desc: From a cursed clock in Prague to a death-defying rescue in the snowy Sierra Nevada Mountains, Josh Gates explores six legendary locations that have withstood the test of time.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: From a tense standoff near the Berlin Wall at the height of the Cold War to an Arizona prison where an unlikely outlaw finagled her freedom, Josh Gates explores five legendary locations where fight or flight were the only options.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Big Game of Texas
programme.desc: During deer season, a trophy buck is the ultimate prize, out-of-state hunters are hit with multiple violations, and shots are fired during an illegal night hunt. Then, a large gator is trapped in wire and a grey fox is found in a residential area.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Breaking Ground
programme.desc: The Browns begin an ambitious barn build, the key to Billy's grand vision. Noah returns reuniting the entire wolfpack for the first time since Alaska.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Head Above Water
programme.desc: Disaster strikes as floods plague the region, and the Browns must balance the fate of their new community with the success of their homestead.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Call to Duty
programme.desc: Noah invents an ingenious device to rid their homesite of moles. Billy gives daughter Rain major responsibility as barn construction goes full bore at the ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bird and the Bees
programme.desc: Ami prepares for a critical doctor check-up, but Billy has concerns about progress on the homestead while they're away. A rogue bear destroys Bam's new beehives forcing the kids to rebuild the hive and save the bees before it's too late.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Family First
programme.desc: Barn construction is all hands-on deck, but the family confronts Bam when he chooses to pay more attention to his own projects.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Smoke There's Fire
programme.desc: A wildlife fire threatens the completion of the barn. Ami and Billy have an important health update.

programme.title: The Man With the 200 lb Tumor
programme.desc: In a remote region of Viet Nam, Hai has been bed-ridden for six years, weighed down by what is possibly the largest tumour in the world.

programme.title: My Legs Won't Stop Growing
programme.desc: Through the lives of three inspirational young women this documentary explores a number of conditions that cause the lower limbs to grow or swell excessively.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: ET Fingers
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent tries to save a man's enormous toe, as Dr. Schaeffer has his hands full treating a little boy with big demands, and a man with incredibly long toes.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity's Story
programme.desc: Charity weighs nearly 800 pounds. Suffering from flesh-eating bacteria and butterfly-shaped fat deposits, she is unable to function without help from her family. When bad news threatens her weight-loss journey, she must decide if she can continue.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Teretha's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Teretha's life is confined to a bed, which is a far cry from her former job representing Detroit's healthy eating program. Her adoring family fears losing her, and hopes a gastric bypass is the solution she needs to save her life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha
programme.desc: In order to keep pace with her daughter Charly's impressive weight loss, Charity must do something she's never done: find a way to go it alone. Try as she might, Teretha finds one too many obstacles in the way of continuing with Dr Nowzaradan's program.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity's Story

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Mandy Moore
programme.desc: Actress Mandy Moore is shocked to discover ancestors that lived in Australia, and travels far, determined to unlock the mystery of how they got there. She's touched by the courage of those who made the journey and the sacrifice of those who did not.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Josh Duhamel
programme.desc: Actor Josh Duhamel travels to England to investigate the extraordinary life of his twelve times great-grandfather and uncovers a shocking, dark twist of interrogation and torture that rocks his belief system to the core.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Make Room for Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle Busby defy all odds by giving birth to the first set of all girl quintuplets in the U.S. After four months in the NICU, the quints come home, and, along with four-year-old sister Blayke, turn Adam and Danielle's lives upside down.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Chaos With Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle struggle to keep up with the demands of the quintuplets while also making time for four-year-old daughter Blayke. Later, a baby photo shoot with the quints turns into pure chaos when Grandma Mimi shows up late to help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Image Is Everything
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Extreme Entourage
programme.desc: Melissa is a headpiece consultant at the store who is shopping for her wedding dress. Stella is having a Greek wedding and has brought along a big entourage. Carli is returning to the store for her final fitting after a challenging dress selection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Surprising Turn of Events
programme.desc: At the salon with her mother, Cindy receives a surprise she never expected. Victoria is overwhelmed by an unexpected family reunion at her appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Pastor Princess
programme.desc: After two broken engagements, pastor bride Shaundalyn wants to look sexy on her big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Elizabeth hopes that dress shopping with her mom will convince her to attend her wedding. Rachel's low budget threatens the chance of getting her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Highs and Woes
programme.desc: At over 6 ft tall, shopping has always been a challenge for Bride Stacy. In for her wedding dress, Stacy's biggest problem is now her unfiltered Mom. After trying on over 80 wedding gowns to date, Bride Taylor is in the salon to find the one - hopefully.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Bridal Change of the Heart
programme.desc: Brandy comes to the salon armed with her country superstar boss, Naomi Judd, with a specific vision for her wedding dress. Runaway bride Rita is ready to walk down the aisle in a short gown. Victoria surprises Monte with a unique request at her fitting.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.desc: The fight between Sammi and Jwoww causes tension in the house. Ronnie and Sammi continue to isolate themselves, missing the first family dinner. Then, when Ronnie decides to hang out and have fun with the rest of the house, Sammi feels all alone.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. Jwoww runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed until she meets a new guy. Deena meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, Jwoww's relationship with Tom comes to an end.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie and Jwoww make up leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family. Mike learns Deena's dirty little secret.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects. Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged. And Pauly makes peace with an old nemesis.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship comes to an end. When Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Moving Target
programme.desc: Game Wardens beef up patrols for the short pronghorn season. A deer needs to be captured and relocated from an industrial site, and an injured hawk is rushed to a rehabber. Near Port Aransas, Game Wardens check duck hunters on the bay.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: The Ultimate Test
programme.desc: A routine check takes a dangerous turn when Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear and Officer Canfield handles a feisty swimmer. Later, New Hampshire's wildlife puts Hannett and MacFadzen to the test when a hostile, injured goose and hawk need rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Hunt for the Hiker
programme.desc: The New Hampshire Conservation Officers are on the look for a missing hiker but will also have their hands full when trying to relocate a pesky, prickly, porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: High Jinks
programme.desc: The wardens battle illegal marijuana across the state. It is dangerous work that often sees armed individuals protecting their land. Three teens are involved in an ATV crash that has the wardens stumped.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: Most of the wildlife in Maine consists of moose, bear and deer. However, on occasion exotic animals make their way into the state and the wardens need to be prepared for anything. This time Sergeant Spahr wrangles a Boa Constrictor.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Passing the Torch

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Saving Cesar
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana and teams up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals. There, they rescue dogs that have a chance of finding homes in the States and Cesar brings several of the dogs to the U.S. to rehabilitate them.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: The Pol clinic helps a guineau pig with some attitude, some piglets that are having trouble eating, and Hope the calf with a dislocated hip. Later, Dr. Pol is convinced to judge a chilli cookoff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol'r Plunge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol braves the icy cold water like a polar bear for charity.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Charles in Charge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his wife go away on vacation leaving the staff the man the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered: Calamity in Space
programme.desc: Visionary feats of engineering lead to the development of the first civilian spacecraft with hopes of placing space travel within easy reach, but catastrophic design flaws send this multi-million dollar endeavor on crash course of tragedy.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Stratolaunch
programme.desc: Test pilots and engineers embark on the first flight of the largest airplane ever constructed, Stratolaunch, a one-of-a-kind carrier aircraft designed to transport rockets, spacecraft and experimental hypersonic planes into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered: Calamity in Space
programme.desc: Visionary feats of engineering lead to the development of the first civilian spacecraft with hopes of placing space travel within easy reach, but catastrophic design flaws send this multi-million dollar endeavor on crash course of tragedy.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Stratolaunch
programme.desc: Test pilots and engineers embark on the first flight of the largest airplane ever constructed, Stratolaunch, a one-of-a-kind carrier aircraft designed to transport rockets, spacecraft and experimental hypersonic planes into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Hate Kills
programme.desc: A rumored hate crime disproven; a seasoned criminal gets a second chance; a defendant shouts an eerie message; a woman accused of attempted murder screams at a judge; and a man shoves a deputy then bolts.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: When a man with a shotgun bursts into his home late one night, a young man is forced to defend himself and protect his fiancee. And then, a man goes on a violent rampage in a diner, and two women find themselves in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Drunk Driving Terror
programme.desc: Two officers respond to a drunk driver speeding the wrong way down a highway and find themselves in a wildly dangerous situation. And then, a family follows a car swerving dangerously, and is forced to intervene to prevent tragedy.

programme.title: Andrea Yates: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: Andrea Yates appears to have the perfect family. But when her fascination with extreme religious ideas and hidden postpartum psychosis lead her to believe Satan is sending messages, she drowns all five of her children, and a media firestorm ensues.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: When a man with a shotgun bursts into his home late one night, a young man is forced to defend himself and protect his fiancee. And then, a man goes on a violent rampage in a diner, and two women find themselves in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Drunk Driving Terror

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Hate Kills
programme.desc: A rumored hate crime disproven; a seasoned criminal gets a second chance; a defendant shouts an eerie message; a woman accused of attempted murder screams at a judge; and a man shoves a deputy then bolts.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Only Two Remain
programme.desc: A husband is bludgeoned to death in his home. His wife and father-in-law claim it was self-defense. But when investigators take a closer at the crime scene, the story of what really happened that night will be put into question.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Secret Siblings
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on twins who were secretly separated at birth, studied for science and kept in the dark about the truth until adulthood. Now the answers as to who was involved in this shocking experiment.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Deadly Anniversary
programme.desc: A 32-year marriage ends with Jim Melgar dead, and his wife Sandy accused of murder. Find out if Sandy killed him, or if police were too quick to close the case. A podcaster with a virtual army of amateur detectives tries to change a verdict.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: One Night in Central Park
programme.desc: It was a crime that rocked New York. Five teens imprisoned for the 1989 attack on a jogger. Thirteen years later, someone else says he was the rapist, and their convictions are overturned. However, for those involved, this story isn't over.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Apocalypse Now
programme.desc: 41-year-old single mother Patty is excited about a new chapter in her life when she begins dating one of her customers, Vietnam veteran Dale. But when Dale becomes violent on their first date, Patty is quickly sent into a desperate struggle for survival.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Serenade of a Stalker
programme.desc: 33 year old Nikki is building a karaoke business with her husband, Ben. But one night, a customer with an obsession for Nikki ends not only the dream but shatters her entire life with an act of extreme and unprovoked violence.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: An Iowa mother is hailed a hero when she shoots an intruder in her home. But as the case evolves, investigators learn things are far from what they seem. Detectives face off against a master manipulator hell-bent on revenge at any cost.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Angel of Death
programme.desc: When a jilted lover storms into a provincial police station making wild accusations against her ex, one detective questions the credibility and motives of the wronged woman. But he has no idea just how sinister her secrets are.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Honor Flight: A Journey of Heroes
World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Honor Flight: A Journey of Heroes
Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Is a Good Thing
programme.desc: The Hills race to finish installing their floor to avoid a delivery delay, which leads to an on-site injury. Meanwhile, Jackie and her team run into problems when their build materials start to fall apart.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Was a Rough One
programme.desc: The Owens work to finish the roof, but multiple falling objects and whiteout conditions make the job perilous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior of her cabin, while the Owens team is at risk of not finishing their client's cabin on time.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Digger's Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the whole story of how the Barnwood Builders transformed Digger's cabin into David's dream home, from a muddy take-down in West Virginia to a tricky build in Texas, and a remarkable finished result.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Beam Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This is the whole story of how a boneyard experiment helped a community rise from the ashes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Triple Meat Trifecta
programme.desc: In Newport, R.I., Michael Symon dives into a triple meat-stacked sandwich with smoked pork belly, bologna and chicken liver pate. A decadent, ultra-crispy and deep-fried soft-shell crab patty in San Francisco will change the way you look at burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is back for seconds of his seven favourite melty, ooey-gooey carnival treats. From the savoury truffled grilled cheese at the St. Paul Winter Carnival.

programme.desc: Experience a vast array of global food, from Mexican tortas to Greek lasagna.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hottest Dogs
programme.desc: From a half-pound kielbasa smothered in Swiss cheese to an all-beef dog stuffed with smoked brisket, these restaurants are all about delicious dogs and sizzling sausages.

programme.desc: In the culinary world of signature meals, nothing else compares to the sensory experience of steak.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Big Red Rig, a bright red, double-decker, thirty-foot trailer tricked out with two massive smokers cooking traditional pulled pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fired-Up Chefs
programme.desc: Two chefs from Texas who love to play with smoke and fire in their restaurants. Tom Spaulding serves classic Texas-style barbecue at his restaurant Live Oak and Tim Byres rolls out spice-rubbed chickens from his unique wood-burning rotisserie.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy

programme.desc: A geeky high school senior, living in a rough neighbourhood in L.A., is invited to a huge, underground party, which propels him and his friends into a wild adventure.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Getting It
programme.desc: Shawn meets his perfect woman, but problems arise when getting intimate.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Who's in Charge Here?
programme.desc: With Pops sick, Shawn and Marlon reluctantly run the diner.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon argue and try living with different roommates.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Hearts and Flowers
programme.desc: Dee thinks that Pops loves her and Shawn is dateless for his own Valentine's Day party.

programme.title: Martin: All the Players Came
programme.desc: Martin organizes a fundraiser to help save a failing theater in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Martin: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Tommy and Cole try to outdo each other in the hopes of being chosen as Martin's best man.

programme.title: Martin: High Noon
programme.desc: A convict named 'Mad Dog No Good' is getting out of jail and wants to meet Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's mother clash over whom to hire as a wedding planner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Boyz in the Woods
programme.desc: Philip, Carlton and Will go on a camping trip, where they get trapped in a mountain cave.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Night at the Oprah
programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Cold War
programme.desc: Vivian quarantines Will and Carlton in the backyard pool house when they both get colds.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Will tries to tell his mother he does not want to return to Philadelphia after graduation.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Winner Takes Off
programme.desc: Geoffrey quits his job with the family after believing he won the big lottery.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: A woman heads home for the holidays, things get complicated and she is forced to work together with her ex for the towns annual scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked with creating a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Land
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a Christmas tree farm from her late grandmother, she decides the sensible thing to do is sell it. However, once she revisits the farm, she falls in love with the townspeople and the farm.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Ana Ayora from the Hallmark Channel original movie, 'The Christmas House.' Hallmark star Sarah Drew.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Holiday
programme.desc: A royal princess runs off from her obligations for a few days to see how the other half lives around Christmas. She winds up falling for a good Samaritan who is unaware of her real identity.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Christening
programme.desc: When Pam and Jim's baby gets christened, Michael invites the whole office to celebrate the occasion.

programme.title: The Office: Viewing Party
programme.desc: Erin holds a 'Glee' viewing party at Gabe's house and invites the whole office over. Andy grows jealous of Gabe's relationship with Erin.

programme.title: The Office: WUPHF.com
programme.desc: Michael helps charm people into investing in Ryan's Internet company. Dwight creates a Hay Festival in the parking lot to celebrate Thanksgiving and his childhood memories at the same time.

programme.title: The Office: China
programme.desc: After reading an article about China being a global power, Michael decides they must be stopped before they can take over the U.S.

programme.title: The Office: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michael waits for news about Holly and her boyfriend. Pam puts up a resolution board for everyone to post their New Year's resolutions.

programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: The Search
programme.desc: Jim gets an emergency phone call and is forced to leave Michael in the bathroom of a gas station. Holly, Erin and Dwight head out on a journey to find Michael.

programme.title: The Office: PDA
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Michael and Holly's public displays of affection make everyone uncomfortable. The aftermath of a bottomless champagne lunch causes complications for Jim and Pam.

programme.title: The Office: Threat Level Midnight
programme.desc: Michael is finally ready to present his long-awaited action movie 'Threat Level Midnight,' to his co-workers and his love interest.

programme.title: The Office: Todd Packer
programme.desc: Todd Packer is ready to stop being a travelling salesman and takes a desk job in the office. Andy fights Pam for a new computer after his keeps freezing.

programme.title: The Office: Garage Sale
programme.desc: Michael decides to propose to Holly while the rest of the staff is holding a garage sale.

programme.title: The Office: Training Day
programme.desc: The new manager has everyone vying to make good first impressions. Andy finds himself awkwardly typecast, and Jim and Pam worry they may have come on too strong.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Nov 12, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Last Dundies
programme.desc: Michael trains Deangeloe on how to take over the job of hosting the Dundie Awards.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: Cartman realizes that he's fat, so he decides to get a mobility scooter.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade
programme.desc: Fearing their new teacher, Miss Choksondik, the kids build a time machine from Timmy's electronic wheelchair to travel back in time to the glory days of the third grade.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Proper Condom Use
programme.desc: In a time-honoured tradition and right-of-passage, the boys are separated from the girls and schooled in the mysteries of sex by none other than Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Protecting the Bees, Yourself & Your Health
programme.desc: Meet Bayer's Award-Winning Blue Ribbon Beekeeper Tucker Leck; learn how to protect yourself with a conducted electronic weapon; ways to maintain an active lifestyle for those with adult incontinence.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas List
programme.desc: After a health scare, a woman conjures up a last wish list of tasks for her daughter and granddaughter to do with the hopes of repairing their strained relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A consultant is hired by a workaholic mother in an effort to get her through the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: A runaway child rekindles a couple's love when it is all but over.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: A grandmother imparts wisdom and special holiday ornaments on her visiting granddaughter.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
